title: youtube poop deluxe edition
description:
new title man
https://www.youtube.com/user/fiv95

when mama lugi found out there was no more toast for his super cool christmas party, he found himself trapped in his imagination (not in the kinky way either.) yoshi walked up to him and said "Tell yoshi bedtime story now" So mama luigi found the book that ganon was imprisoned in. He opened it and freed the evil ganon. Meanwhile, the king was enjoying his spaghetti and toast dinner with volvic water. Weegee was their guest of honor at the time as well. Ganon then stole his dinner. The king then sent link to save his dinner or he will DIE. so now link goes forth to find the kings dinner and while this happens, mama luigi plays rather unfitting music to try and calm down the restless yoshi.

this is a youtube poop by the way.
